description:
India Book II, 44. Memorandum from Yosef b. Avraham to Yiṣḥaq al-Nafūsī. Aden, 1130s. See also Moss. IV,84.2 (PGPID 36651).

In the margin: من عدن الى(؟) لعيذاب وغيرها . . .
tags: shashiyya, memorandum, informal note, cotton, IB2, India
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מעדן. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
